scope: bounded canonical benchmark inherited from USD-W2 and stabilized by USD-W3
complete_cost_accounting: decoders recovery maps and source-specific adapters

decision_rules.locally_load_bearing: direct removal causes at least one preservation failure and no cheaper reconstruction succeeds
decision_rules.equivalently_reintroduced: preservation is restored only by machinery commitment-equivalent to the removed unit and that machinery is fully charged
decision_rules.locally_redundant: removal or a strictly cheaper non-equivalent reconstruction preserves every obligation

global_boundary: Local load-bearing status over this frozen benchmark is not global necessity over all vocabularies, representations, or S_IRD.
